name: TELEDYNE TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: PARTI Who We Are Teledyne Technologies Incorporated is a Delaware corporation that provides enabling technologies to sense, analyze and distribute information for industrial growth markets that require advanced technology and high reliability. These markets include aerospace and defense, factory automation, air and water quality environmental monitoring, electronics design and development, oceanographic research, deepwater oil and gas exploration and production, medical imaging and pharmaceutica...
